overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's downtown district at night. The scene features wet streets reflecting vibrant neon lights from futuristic buildings and holographic billboards, with the camera following pedestrians through sidewalks and across intersections.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with NCPD police building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk following two pedestrians, one wearing a white shirt and another in a red crop top with red pants

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead of ego
pedestrian in red crop top and red pants walking ahead

entered.detail: futuristic building entrance with glowing green NCPD signage and visible escalator
large digital advertisement screen displaying animated content on building facade
tall industrial pole with multiple horizontal neon light fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet neon-lit sidewalk in Night City, with the NCPD building entrance visible on the left featuring green neon signage. The camera follows two pedestrians walking ahead while other sparse foot traffic passes by, and holographic billboards illuminate the building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large intersection with MARQUESS building and crosswalk

events.description: transitioning from covered sidewalk to open intersection approach with MARQUESS building becoming visible
futuristic vehicle passes by on the right while approaching crosswalk

agents.ego_description: approaching and beginning to cross the intersection while following the two pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street adjacent to the crosswalk

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent golden MARQUESS signage and multiple vertical holographic displays
bold yellow striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on wet reflective asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up as the camera approaches a wide intersection, with the prominent MARQUESS building rising on the right featuring bright golden signage. The character steps onto the yellow crosswalk markings while futuristic vehicles pass by, and the NCPD building recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: crossing multi-lane intersection with heavy neon signage and traffic

events.description: waiting for traffic to clear while standing on crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings, navigating between passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: large vertical illuminated billboard displaying DYNALAR text with portrait advertisement

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the center of the wide intersection, with the MARQUESS building now in the distance to the right. The DYNALAR billboard becomes visible on the left while futuristic vehicles drive through the crossing, and the yellow crosswalk stripes extend across the wet reflective pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: opposite side of intersection with commercial storefronts and billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along the opposite sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and the large DYNALAR billboard

entered.detail: modern building with illuminated ground floor shops and large glass windows

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera proceeds along the opposite sidewalk where the DYNALAR billboard now dominates the left side at close range. The MARQUESS building and crosswalk recede behind as the character walks past commercial storefronts with illuminated facades and sparse pedestrian traffic moving in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched downtown district, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk into a wide, bustling intersection before returning to a commercial pedestrian path. It begins on a wet sidewalk beside the NCPD building, where green neon signage and holographic billboards illuminate the path as the camera follows pedestrians forward. As the space opens up, the camera moves onto a yellow crosswalk at a wide intersection, leaving the NCPD building behind while the golden signage of the MARQUESS building rises prominently to the right. The scene then shifts through the center of the crossing, where futuristic vehicles glide across reflective pavement and a DYNALAR billboard emerges on the left. Finally, the camera proceeds onto the opposite sidewalk, passing beneath the towering DYNALAR display and moving past illuminated storefronts as the intersection recedes into the distance.
